conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const i = $json.body.issue || {}; const labs = (i.labels || []).map(l => (l.name||'').toLowerCase()); const t = i.title || ''; if (i.type && i.type.name) return i.type.name; if (labs.includes('bug') || /^\s*\[bug\]/i.test(t)) return 'Bug'; if (labs.includes('feature') || /^\s*\[feature\]/i.test(t)) return 'Feature'; return 'Feature'; })() }}
